gates.evidence: replication/manifest.json + work/01_audit/audit.json; 2 inputs SHA-256 hashed; schema 138896x24; seed + package versions recorded.

work/02_profile/profile.{md,json}; leakage scan flagged violations/results_raw/violation_count as outcome-derived; within-day weather variance=0 -> date clustering mandated; 19,611 estab with >=2 inspections support estab FE.
work/03_design/hypotheses.json; 5 pre-registered hypotheses + must-pass diagnostics; RDD/DiD rejected; primary=H1.
paper/tables/table1_main.tex + 2 figures; primary temp effect 0.443 ppt/10C (p=0.1507); diagnostics (placebo, seasonality, balance) run; claims logged.
13 specs (12/13 positive, 2/13 sig@.10); coarse clustering, wild bootstrap, multiplicity (Bonferroni min-p 0.4056); H4 drop-one-facility FAILS (pass=False); count family Bonferroni 0.084.
3 rounds of BLOCKING objections (8+5+3) all resolved + computationally verified; confirmatory 4th pass returned NO remaining BLOCKING. Failed H4 diagnostic reported honestly.
paper/main.tex drafted from on-disk artifacts; orphan-number check PASS (85 numerals, 0 orphans).

replication/run_all.sh regenerates manifest+claims+tables+figures+PDF from data/raw in one command; two independent clean-copy runs produced byte-identical tables; estimator-equivalence max delta 8e-05 ppt; PDF compiled.

headline.conclusion: No robust effect of inspection-day weather on inspection failure; naive gradient is seasonal/compositional confounding.

blocking_converted_to_limitations: Identification ceiling: weather constant within day -> Estab+Day FE infeasible (collinear); cannot net out arbitrary daily shocks. Reported as a prominent limitation.

Composition channel: inspection type is a temperature-driven mediator; preferred primary is a reduced-form total effect bundling safety + selection. Scheduled-only subsample isolates the non-selection channel and is also null.
weakest_point: The bounded null is underpowered against modest effects: the 95% CI upper bound (+1.19 ppt/10C, 5.22% of base rate) does not exclude a small positive effect; identification also cannot rule out correlated within-day shocks. A human should check the scheduled-only estimate (0.674 ppt, p=0.053 date / 0.10 month) — the closest the data come to a positive effect.
